articles.title: Noida Protest Accused Got Over Rs 1 Crore From Foreign Countries: Cops
articles.description: The law and order situation had deteriorated during violent protest in Noida in April.

articles.title: 'U.S. Behind Instability': Russia Slams Trump's Iran War; Bats For Gulf Stability | WATCH
articles.description: Russian Security Council Secretary Sergei Shoigu stated that the West has misappropriated assets belonging to other states worth over half a trillion dollars, speaking at a meeting of the Shanghai Co-operation Organisation (SCO) in Bishkek on Thursday. Shoigu expressed confidence that 'the leaders will draw the correct conclusions' about the risks of holding national savings in Western banks. Additionally, the Secretary of the Russian Security Council noted that the global situation continues to 'steadily worsen' due to the United States' desire to preserve its status as a dominant power. Watch.

articles.title: UP adopts curbs to save fuel, BJP state chief urges lifestyle changes
articles.description: Chairman of Uttar Pradesh Legislative Council Kunwar Manvendra Singh has postponed all previously scheduled tour programmes of the parliamentary committees of the council until further orders. Principal secretary, legislative council, Rajesh Singh confirmed district-level officials would participate in parliamentary committee meetings through video conferencing until further orders.

articles.title: CM Fadnavis’ bike ride draws Opposition ire
articles.description: Maharashtra CM Fadnavis' bike ride sparks opposition criticism amid austerity calls, questioning the government's sincerity and measures post-election.

articles.title: 'I Personally Warned...': Sen. Kelly's Epic Iran Grilling Of U.S. Generals Stuns Hegseth | WATCH
articles.description: US Senator Mark Kelly questioned U.S. Central Command Commander Admiral Brad Cooper and AFRICOM Commander General Dagvin Anderson during a Senate Armed Services Committee hearing, focusing on civilian casualties linked to operations involving Iran and the expanding influence of China and Russia in Africa. Kelly pressed the military leaders on measures to reduce civilian harm and stressed the importance of countering foreign disinformation campaigns across the African continent. Watch the key exchange from Capitol Hill. Watch.

articles.title: India-Israel ties special, unique; rooted in 6 shared values: Envoy
articles.description: On Israel's 78th anniversary, Ambassador Reuven Azar highlighted the 'special and unique' India-Israel relationship. He said the partnership is rooted in six shared values: civilisational resilience, counter-terrorism, and democratic values.

articles.title: Commentary: UMNO has ambitions for Malaysia's next general election but little room for manoeuvre
articles.description: Being part of Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s unity government has helped UMNO retain some relevance, but this will bring a different challenge come election time, says Asian Studies professor James Chin.

articles.title: Is Malaysia’s BN gearing up for early state polls in Johor and Melaka with eye on GE?
articles.description: Early elections in these two states would allow Barisan Nasional to drum up momentum and signal that the pact has regained strength ahead of the next general election, observers say.

articles.title: Commentary: Trump’s disinterest not the only reason the Quad is in limbo
articles.description: The Quad risks geopolitical insignificance if summit-level meetings are not resumed, says former foreign correspondent Nirmal Ghosh.

articles.title: Ludhiana: Jagraon bridge elevated road in bad shape, commuters suffer
articles.description: Activist Parminder Mehta, who has been taking up the issue with the municipal corporation, said that the contractor stopped the work about a month ago, soon after starting

articles.title: Villivakkam to get new medical college, better civic infrastructure: Minister Aadhav Arjuna
articles.description: Villivakkam will enhance civic infrastructure with a new medical college and improved safety measures, as announced by Minister Aadhav Arjuna.

articles.title: Keeping the joy of togetherness alive
articles.description: In An Age Of Shrinking Families, The Thakkars Show That One Roof Can House Many Hearts

articles.title: Gujarat: Secretariat staff ask for WFH system
articles.description: Gujarat Sachivalaya Federation urges CM Bhupendra Patel to introduce phased work-from-home, 5-day week and e-sarkar use; cabinet may decide soon.

articles.title: Smelling flowers
articles.description: Flowers offer a unique sensory pleasure. Their scent molecules travel a direct route to the brain, impacting memory and emotions. This triggers neurotransmitters that reduce stress and promote happiness. Early humans were drawn to flowers for survival, a trait now evolved into aesthetic appreciation. Inhaling floral scents creates a powerful neurological connection, transforming simple molecules into profound feelings of joy.

articles.title: Calcutta HC orders police to ensure safe return of post-poll violence victims in Bengal
articles.description: The Calcutta High Court has ordered police to maintain law and order and ensure the safe return of anyone illegally evicted from their shops or homes in West Bengal. This directive comes after allegations of post-poll violence, with former Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee appearing in court.

articles.title: Suvendu Adhikari tightens cattle slaughter rules, cracks down on illegal markets in Bengal
articles.description: The Suvendu Adhikari government has enforced strict regulations on animal slaughter in West Bengal, mandating compliance with the 1950 Act. The order prohibits public slaughter and requires a fitness certificate for animals, with violations punishable by jail time and fines. Additionally, authorities are cracking down on illegal cattle markets and unauthorized slaughterhouses.

articles.title: T HC judge disposes 226 writ petitions in a day, sets record
articles.description: Telangana High Court Justice Surepalli Nanda sets record by disposing 226 writ petitions in one day, including PACS election pleas, land disputes and seizures.

articles.title: Govt restricts all official foreign trips, nixes nods
articles.description: The Goa government has implemented an immediate ban on all official foreign travel for public servants, following Prime Minister Modi's directive to reduce unnecessary expenditures. This decision affects previously approved trips, raising concerns about the tourism department's marketing plans abroad.

articles.title: Mandate Vs. Math: Why Congress Got Kerala Right
articles.description: Ten days, three contenders, one state watching. The story of how Congress almost got its own Kerala moment wrong — and why it pulled back just in time.

articles.title: Trump, Xi hold talks at high-stakes meeting in Beijing; PM Modi to embark on five-nation tour
articles.description: Trump, Xi hold talks at high-stakes meeting in Beijing; PM Modi to embark on five-nation tour

articles.title: 'I Won't Be Scared': HC Judge Swarana Sharma Initiates Contempt Action Against Kejriwal
articles.description: The remarks came during proceedings in the excise policy case, where the bench has been hearing challenges and related applications involving multiple accused.

articles.title: Free and fair elections can happen only if there are independent Election Commissioners, SC says
articles.description: Supreme Court emphasizes the need for independent Election Commissioners to ensure free and fair elections, questioning the current selection process.

articles.title: 'Kejriwal orchestrated vilification campaign': HC judge Swarana Sharma on contempt petition
articles.description: Justice Sharma had earlier refused to allow Kejriwal's plea wherein he had sought her recusal from hearing the CBI's appeal against his discharge.

articles.title: Education Minister Pradhan shown black flags outside IIMA campus by NSUI over NEET paper leak
articles.description: NSUI says his visit was kept a secret to avoid to avoid protests; Gujarat Congress demands resignation of Union Education Minister.

articles.title: Shivamogga District Congress Committee president demands Union Minister Dharmendra Pradhan’s resignation
articles.description: Shivamogga Congress leader demands Union Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation over NEET-UG question paper leak and exam mismanagement.

articles.title: AIADMK split: Edappadi Palaniswami didn’t agree to making Thirumavalavan the CM, says C.Ve. Shanmugam
articles.description: Palaniswami reportedly rejected the proposal to make Thirumavalavan Chief Minister, claims AIADMK rebel leader Shanmugam.

articles.title: KMC chief orders action against negligent sanitation officials
articles.description: Kurnool Commissioner Challa Obulesu reprimands negligent officials and mandates sanitation improvements across the city.

articles.title: V D Satheesan Unseen PHOTOS: Check Out Kerala CM's Rare Pics From His College Days
articles.description: V. D. Satheesan jumped into the leadership scene through his student politics days at Thevara and Rajagiri colleges. He became the MG University Union Chairman in 1987. Here are some rare photos of V. D. from that time, shared by P.N. Sreekumar.

articles.title: Chouhan pens book on his association with Modi
articles.description: Union Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan's book "Apnapan" reveals his personal insights on PM Modi's leadership and values.

articles.title: Will erase 'blot of drugs' from Punjab: CM Mann
US aid cuts harm global human rights movement, says Human Rights Watch
articles.description: A Human Rights Watch report says the US government's 2025 foreign aid cuts harmed the global human rights movement. Titled 'Every Autocrat's Dream', it details how the cuts halted investigations and support for victims in 16 countries.

articles.title: VD Satheesan appointed Kerala Congress CLP leader, AICC team to visit
articles.description: VD Satheesan has been named the new Kerala Congress Legislative Party leader. AICC observers confirmed the decision followed wide consultations and will visit Thiruvananthapuram. Satheesan thanked Rahul Gandhi and called for a collective effort.

articles.title: Public support outweighs seniority: V D Satheesan emerges winner in Kerala CM race
articles.description: Kerala CM: Congress named VD Satheesan as Chief Minister after weighing public support, UDF backing and his leadership in Opposition. Rahul Gandhi, Mallikarjun Kharge and allies including Muslim League were part of the final consultations in Delhi.

articles.title: EC Orders Phase III Of Special Intensive Revision In 16 States, 3 UTs; Himachal, J&K, Ladakh Excluded
articles.description: Election Commission of India launches SIR Phase III in 16 States and 3 UTs, 3.94 lakh BLOs to visit 36.73 crore electors, excluding Himachal Pradesh, Jammu and Kashmir, Ladakh

articles.title: HC reserves verdict as amicus curiae points: ‘A cyclist can use rail underbridge, a pedestrian also can...they can’t use flyovers’
articles.description: Referring to page 290 of the Master Plan, Bedi argued that dedicated BRTS corridors had already been proposed, including along Dakshin Marg.

articles.title: Karti Chidambaram slams Centre over NEET leak, demands its scrapping
articles.description: Congress MP Karti Chidambaram called the NEET-UG 2026 paper leak a "colossal failure," demanding the exam's scrapping. He also expressed confidence that Congress MLAs would be inducted into the Tamil Nadu Cabinet under CM Vijay.

articles.title: Siddaramaiah congratulates V D Satheesan, new Chief Minister of Kerala
articles.description: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah congratulated V D Satheesan on being elected as the Leader of the Congress Legislature Party and the next Chief Minister of Kerala, praising his long political journey and legislative experience.

articles.title: VD Satheesan's Net Worth: New Kerala CM Owns Assets Worth Over Rs 6 Crore
articles.description: The Congress on Thursday officially announced senior leader V D Satheesan as the new Chief Minister of Kerala, ending days of intense speculation over who would lead the Congress-led United Democratic Front (UDF) after its resounding election victory.

articles.title: ECI announces schedule for Phase 3 of Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls
articles.description: ECI announces Phase III schedule for SIR electoral rolls, covering 16 states and 3 Union Territories, enhancing voter eligibility.

articles.title: Congress Picks VD Satheesan as Kerala CM After 10 Days of Talks and Leadership Battle
articles.description: The Congress has appointed V D Satheesan as Kerala’s new Chief Minister after ten days of internal consultations and leadership discussions. Satheesan defeated contenders including K C Venugopal and Ramesh Chennithala in the race for the top post. Calling it the start of a “new Kerala,” Satheesan promised governance reforms and thanked Venugopal for coordinating the Congress campaign. He is widely seen as the architect of the UDF’s sweeping 102-seat victory. Watch

articles.title: EAM Jaishankar welcomes Russian FM Sergey Lavrov at BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting
articles.description: New Delhi hosted the BRICS Foreign Ministers' meeting. External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar welcomed delegates from member and observer nations. The meeting is part of India's 2026 BRICS chairship. Discussions covered global and regional issues. India assumed the BRICS Chairmanship on January 1.

articles.title: 'Have entered the fray to abolish Sanatana': Now, TVK MLA Mustafa endorses Udhayanidhi Stalin's remark
articles.description: TVK MLA VMS Mustafa's remarks endorsing DMK leader Udhayanidhi Stalin's call to "abolish Sanatan" have sparked a political controversy in Tamil Nadu. Mustafa stated that his party also subscribes to the ideals of Periyar and Ambedkar, aiming to eradicate Sanatana. These comments come after Udhayanidhi reignited the debate in the Assembly, drawing criticism from the BJP.

articles.title: 'Entirely Unfounded': UAE's SWIFT Denial After Netanyahu Claims Secret Meet With MBZ During Iran War
articles.description: The United Arab Emirates has strongly denied reports that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu secretly visited the country during the Iran conflict or that it hosted any Israeli military delegation. The denial came after Israel claimed Netanyahu met UAE President Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan amid the regional crisis. The UAE insisted its ties with Israel are conducted openly under the Abraham Accords and warned media against spreading “unverified information.” The controversy comes as tensions between Iran, Israel, and Gulf nations continue to escalate.

articles.title: Vijay's MLA Mustafa says ‘Sanatana’ will be abolished
articles.description: We too subscribe to the ideals of Periyar and Ambedkar. We too have entered the fray to abolish Sanatana, says VMS Mustafa

articles.title: Iran FM Araghchi meets Jaishankar at BRICS meeting in Delhi
articles.description: The BRICS meeting is being held at the Bharat Mandapam in the national capital.

articles.title: Modern conflicts will be shaped not only by fighter aircraft but also by AI, cyber warfare: Air Marshal Ashutosh Dixit
articles.description: Air Marshal Ashutosh Dixit emphasized that India's future military strength hinges on AI, cyber warfare, and drones, not just traditional platforms. He urged MSMEs to become long-term national security partners, highlighting a significant ₹10 lakh crore opportunity in the expanding defence ecosystem.

articles.title: OPINION | Modi’s 5-nation visit will deepen India’s multi-alignment approach to foreign policy
articles.description: From May 15 to 20, the prime minister will visit key powers across West Asia and Europe. The underlying message is India is no longer content with symbolism; it’s looking to strengthen partnerships

articles.title: KC Venugopal vs VD Satheesan: Does Congress Have Answer To Kerala Drama?
articles.description: The Congress-led UDF recorded an emphatic win in last month's Kerala Assembly election, sweeping 102 of the state's 140 seats to stop the CPM-backed Left Democratic Front from retaining power in the last state it rules.

articles.title: SIR Goes Beyond Polls As Bengal, Bihar Vow To Bar Deleted Names From Social Welfare Schemes
articles.description: BJP governments in both states have started using SIR-linked data to identify beneficiaries they believe should no longer receive welfare benefits.

articles.title: Iran's Araghchi Brings "Minab168" To Delhi For BRICS Talks
articles.description: The situation surrounding the closure of the Strait of Hormuz-- the vital waterway through which around a fifth of global oil supply passes in peacetime-- is expected to feature prominently in bilateral talks between Araghchi and Jaishankar.
